title: KnowledgeNode
description: Single extractable concept unit in a knowledge-graph.json domain

bloom_target.description: Highest Bloom level this concept should reach. Default: apply for youtube/podcast, analyze for book/article.

depth_level.description: Hierarchy depth. 1 = top-level concept. 2 = sub-concept of a branch. 3 = sub-sub-concept.

parent_concept.description: Snake_case key of the parent concept. null if depth_level = 1.

children.description: Snake_case keys of direct children. Empty array if leaf node.

source_name.description: Human-readable name of the source (e.g. channel name, book title, article title)

source_section.description: Where in the source this concept lives. E.g. 'phút 8–12', 'Chapter 3', 'lines 45–82'

trust_level.description: EXTRACTED = literally stated in source. INFERRED = Claude's synthesis from source evidence.

argument_flow.description: Sequence of rhetorical moves. E.g. 'hook → problem → mechanism → example → application'

core_question.description: The single question this concept answers. Used as session entry point.

extracted.description: Verbatim or close-paraphrase of the concept as stated in source. Must be non-empty.

inferred.description: Claude's synthesis not directly stated in source. Optional — only if adds value.

anchor_story.description: Concrete story, case, or example that makes the concept memorable. Not subject to falsifiability check.

falsifiability.description: What evidence would disprove the main claim, and whether that evidence was found.

child.description: Analogy-first explanation for a 10-year-old. No jargon.

student.description: Mechanism + context explanation for an educated non-expert.

expert.description: Trade-offs, edge cases, failure modes for a practitioner.

misconception_seeds.description: Common wrong beliefs about this concept. Minimum 2. Used by Socratic Layer 1.

transfer_question.description: Scenario-based question requiring application in a new context. Must be non-empty.

next_actions.description: Concrete experiments or activities to do with this knowledge.

open_questions.description: What the source left unresolved or unclear.

last_reextracted.description: ISO date of last extraction. E.g. '2026-05-14'

relations.description: Concept graph edges. All values are snake_case concept keys.

prerequisites.description: Concepts that must be understood before this one.

examples_of.description: Parent concept this is an instance of. E.g. 'monastic_model' examples_of 'four_deep_work_models'

contrasts_with.description: Concepts that highlight this one by contrast.

supports.description: Concepts this one provides evidence for.

cross_domain.description: Related concepts in other domains. Use 'domain:concept_key' format.

learner_state.description: Managed exclusively by socratic skill scripts. Do not edit manually.

belief_prior.description: Learner's own words on what they think the concept is before any teaching.

consecutive_correct.description: Correct answers in a row at current bloom level. Resets on wrong answer.

hint_fails_total.description: Lifetime hint failures for this concept.

needs_restructure.description: True when 2 hint fails in a session. Signals Stage 1 re-extraction needed.

next_review.description: ISO date of next spaced-repetition review. null = not yet studied.

personal_misconceptions.description: Misconceptions this specific learner has demonstrated. Key = misconception text, value = count.

contradictions.description: Claims in this node that conflict with other sources or other nodes. Populated during review.
